name: Lista de Tarefas
js:
AppManager.register('todo',{init:function(b,win){b.innerHTML='
Lista de Tarefas
';b.className='p-16 flex-col';var list=TK.byId('td-list');var input=TK.byId('td-input');var items=[];try{var saved=localStorage.getItem('webos_todo');if(saved)items=JSON.parse(saved)}catch(e){}function save(){try{localStorage.setItem('webos_todo',JSON.stringify(items))}catch(e){}}function render(){TK.empty(list);items.forEach(function(item,i){var div=TK.el('div',{className:'td-item'+(item.done?' done':'')});var cb=document.createElement('input');cb.type='checkbox';cb.className='td-check';cb.checked=item.done;cb.onchange=function(){items[i].done=cb.checked;save();render()};div.appendChild(cb);var span=document.createElement('span');span.textContent=item.text;div.appendChild(span);var del=TK.el('button',{className:'td-del'},'x');del.onclick=function(){items.splice(i,1);save();render()};div.appendChild(del);list.appendChild(div)})}TK.byId('td-add').onclick=function(){var t=input.value.trim();if(!t)return;items.push({text:t,done:false});input.value='';save();render()};input.onkeydown=function(e){if(e.key==='Enter')TK.byId('td-add').onclick()};render()}})
